name: Favorite Chocolate Carmel Nut Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Melt caramels with 1/3 cup of the milk in a heavy saucepan over low heat, stirring frequently until smooth. Set aside.
3. In a large bowl, mix the remaining milk, cake mix, and melted butter or margarine.
4. Press half of the cake mixture onto the bottom of a 13 x 9 inch baking pan.
5. Bake for 8 minutes.
6. Sprinkle 1 cup of chopped walnuts and 1/2 cup of chocolate chips over the crust.
7. Top with caramel sauce, spreading to the edges of the pan.
8. Spread 1/2 cup of remaining cake mixture over the caramel.
9. Sprinkle the remaining chopped walnuts and chocolate chips on top.
10. Bake for an additional 18 minutes. Cool before cutting into bars.
